WE'RE HIRING | Legal Operations Executive (LPO)

Sector 132, Noida
Salary: ₹35,000–₹60,000/month based on experience 
Openings: 10

Requirements:

• 1–3 years of US Paralegal/LPO experience
• Excellent English communication skills
• Comfortable working in the US shift

Send your CV: hr@fourfoldlegal.com

Join Fourfold LPO and grow your legal career with us
